title: Engineer Prompt Lab
description: A web-based playground for experimenting with structured prompts, enabling developers and engineers to design, test, and refine prompt workflows.
overview: Interactive environment to experiment with structured prompts and prompt engineering workflows.
problem: Engineers and developers struggle to design, test, and refine complex prompt workflows efficiently.
solution: Built a dedicated playground for structured prompt engineering with real-time feedback.
workflow: Built interactive UI for prompt testing
Integrated AI API for real-time validation

title: TolStack Pro2
description: Tolerance stack-up analysis tool for mechanical engineers to evaluate dimensional variation in assemblies.
overview: Engineering calculator for tolerance stack-up analysis in mechanical design.
problem: Mechanical engineers often perform tolerance stack calculations manually or with spreadsheets, which is error-prone.
solution: A web-based interactive tool that visualizes tolerance accumulation instantly.

title: Safer Highways India
description: A civic-tech awareness platform presenting highway safety issues and solutions using clear information design and data-driven storytelling.
overview: Awareness platform highlighting highway safety issues and solutions for India.
problem: Road safety data is often inaccessible or poorly presented to the public.
solution: Created a data-driven storytelling platform to visualize safety issues and propose solutions.

title: GD&T Mechanical Design
description: An educational web resource explaining geometric dimensioning and tolerancing concepts for mechanical engineering learners.
overview: Learning resource explaining GD&T concepts for mechanical engineers.
problem: GD&T concepts are complex and often taught through static textbooks.
solution: Developed an interactive web resource to explain geometric dimensioning concepts visually.

title: Markdown Converter
description: A lightweight developer utility that converts markdown content into publish-ready formats.
overview: Tool for converting markdown content into different formats for publishing workflows.
problem: Converting markdown to other formats often requires complex CLI tools.
solution: Created a simple web-based converter for quick format transformation.
workflow: Added support for multiple export formats

title: SysML Lite
description: A simplified educational interface for learning SysML modeling concepts used in systems engineering.
overview: Lightweight educational reference for understanding SysML modeling concepts.
problem: SysML tools are heavy and complex for beginners to understand core concepts.
solution: Built a lightweight reference guide for SysML modeling elements.

title: Route Planner
description: An interactive route planning application designed to simplify travel path exploration and trip preparation.
overview: Web application for planning routes and optimizing travel paths.
problem: Planning complex travel routes often involves juggling multiple map tools.
solution: Integrated route planning and optimization into a single interactive map interface.

title: LumiDisplay
description: A sandbox project exploring modern UI components and interactive display patterns.
overview: Experimental environment for testing modern UI components and display concepts.
problem: Testing new UI concepts in production apps is risky and slow.
solution: Created a dedicated sandbox for experimenting with cutting-edge UI patterns.
